items.name: theme
items.title: Crash Override theme
items.description: Brand tokens (oklch light+dark) + fonts. Install first.

items.name: layout
items.title: Layout primitives
items.description: Stack, Group, Center, Box, Grid — className-first flex/grid primitives with asChild support.

items.name: divider
items.title: Divider
items.description: Hairline rule (brand name for a separator). Horizontal or vertical.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Branded action button — neon-lime primary, outline secondary, cobalt enterprise, quiet ghost.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Flat surface primitive — slate card bg, hairline border, no heavy shadow. Optional capability accent bar and interactive hover.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Status / label pill keyed to the brand palette. Lowercase mono voice, soft + outline fills, optional leading dot.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text field on the dark surface — hairline --input border, neon focus ring, sharp brand radius.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Form field label in the brand's uppercase mono voice. Built on Radix Label for click-to-focus.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Composes Label + control + help/error into one accessible field. Wires aria-describedby and aria-invalid onto the control.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input on the dark surface — hairline --input border, neon focus ring, vertical resize.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Dropdown select matching the Input voice — hairline --input trigger, neon focus ring, popover content with neon check on selected items.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Square control — hairline --input box, neon --primary fill with dark check glyph when checked. Sharp brand radius.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: On/off toggle — hairline --input track when off, neon --primary fill when on. Themes in light and dark.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: RadioGroup
items.description: Single-select group — hairline --input circles, selected item border + dot in neon --primary. Neon focus ring.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range slider — hairline --input track, neon --primary filled range, round --background thumbs with a primary focus ring. Single or multi-thumb.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Two-state toggle button — quiet muted voice, lifts to --accent when pressed. Mono label, sharp radius. Default and outline variants.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: ToggleGroup
items.description: Segmented set of toggles — single or multiple. Items join into one sharp control with hairline dividers; pressed segment fills --accent. Built on Toggle.
